tasks.name: Add write_inference_cache() to hex-cli inference.rs
tasks.description: After any successful add/remove/calibrate call to nexus, fetch GET /api/inference/endpoints and write ~/.hex/inference-servers.json with format {version:1, updated_at, endpoints:[...]}. Call this from add_provider(), remove_provider(), and calibrate_inference() success paths.
tasks.done_condition: hex inference add ollama http://localhost:11434 --model test writes ~/.hex/inference-servers.json
tasks.done_command: test -f ~/.hex/inference-servers.json && python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert 'endpoints' in d and d['version']==1" ~/.hex/inference-servers.json

tasks.name: Add preload_inference_cache() to hex-nexus config_sync.rs
tasks.description: Add async fn preload_inference_cache(project_root, stdb_host, stdb_db) that reads ~/.hex/inference-servers.json, fetches the current endpoint list from the nexus REST API (GET /api/inference/endpoints), and for each cached endpoint whose id is not already registered, calls POST /api/inference/endpoints to re-register it. Log how many were preloaded. Call this from sync_project_config_with_report() after the existing sync steps. Stale/unreachable endpoints should log a warning but not fail startup.
tasks.done_condition: After removing an endpoint from STDB and restarting nexus, the endpoint is restored from cache
